note: Explorer cascade hint simplified to V10 only — the historical V8/V9 regimes are no longer surfaced. The BLOCK LAG card shows 'V10 granular cascade · −1 / 60s after 600s · floor E7' with the dynamic 'drop N lvl, next in Xs' or 'arms in Xs' phase. If the chain ever drops below height 6,700 the panel hides. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
